title: Tick Control in Yonkers, NY | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Yonkers, NY from $125 - $325. Protect your family and pets from Lyme disease. Expert tick extermination in Westchester County. Call today!
intro: Yonkers residents face serious tick threats in local parks, yards, and wooded areas throughout Westchester County. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services to protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Our targeted treatments create safe, tick-free outdoor spaces so you can enjoy your Yonkers property worry-free.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Yonkers and Westchester County with proven tick elimination methods. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments tailored to Yonkers' unique landscape, from Hudson River waterfront properties to hillside homes, ensuring maximum protection at competitive rates.
localContext: Yonkers' proximity to Untermyer Park, the Saw Mill River trails, and numerous wooded residential areas creates ideal tick habitats throughout the city. From historic neighborhoods near Getty Square to newer developments in North Yonkers, our tick control services protect homes, multi-family buildings, and commercial properties across all four square city zones.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Yonkers' abundance of parks, wooded areas, and proximity to natural habitats makes it a high-risk area for ticks carrying Lyme disease and other illnesses. Regular tick control protects your family, pets, and visitors from potentially serious health risks while allowing you to safely enjoy outdoor spaces.

faqs.question: What does your Yonkers tick control service include?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted barrier spray treatment around your yard perimeter, vegetation management recommendations, and follow-up applications as needed. We focus on high-risk areas like wooded edges, tall grass, and shaded zones where ticks typically hide.

faqs.question: When is the best time for tick treatment in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Westchester County runs from April through October, with peak activity in spring and fall. We recommend starting treatments in early spring and maintaining regular applications every 4-6 weeks throughout the season for optimal protection.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and for 2-3 hours afterward until the treatment dries, then your yard is safe to enjoy.
